title: MAGAZINE ISSUE detail page » CAR MODELS
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the MAGAZINE ISSUE detail page to show all connected CAR MODELS
So I can ...
description:
* The MAGAZINE ISSUE detail page contains a section with a list of all connected CAR MODELS.
* Each CAR MODEL in the list is presented with its name and primary information.
* Each CAR MODEL in the list contains a link to its detail page.
* Each CAR MODEL in the list has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no CAR MODEL connected to the MAGAZINE ISSUE then the section is not displayed at all.
